data.name: Maid Knight Alicia
data.detailed_description:
★★女仆骑士艾莉西亚2合1剧情，一份的价格双倍的快乐！★★

游戏剧情

《女仆骑士艾莉西亚：装备限制诅咒》
作为挥舞正义之剑的骑士，肩负惩治魔物与恶人之使命的艾莉西亚，
却被曾经放跑过的一个魔法师施下了恶毒的诅咒。

“装备限制的诅咒”
即为无法穿戴铠甲，这对一名骑士而言堪称致命。
没有因此丧失斗志的艾莉西亚誓要将始作俑者斩杀，解开诅咒。
但此时手中的最强装备，竟然是一套女仆装……。

《女仆骑士艾莉西亚：宁芙族的财宝》
宁芙族的财宝被魔剑士抢夺而去。
而这财宝，对于遭到诅咒的艾莉西亚而言，似乎有效。
财宝究竟为何物？
半信半疑的艾莉西亚为了夺回宁芙族的财宝，动身前往魔剑士的宅邸。

游戏特征

  • 1对1的回合制战斗模式
  • 根据战局，选择合适的指令对战
  • 关卡式剧情

data.short_description: 作为挥舞正义之剑的骑士，肩负惩治魔物与恶人之使命的艾莉西亚， 却被曾经放跑过的一个魔法师施下了“无法穿戴装备”的恶毒诅咒。 仅凭一套女仆装，艾莉西亚踏上了复仇与解开诅咒的冒险之旅。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 簡體中文, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Maid Knight Alicia
data.detailed_description:
STORY

Knight's mission is to wield his sword for justice and protect his people from demons and evildoers.
As fate would have it, these evildoers resent the knights.
Alicia is a female knight who has won many battles with her armor and sword.
One day, however, a sorcerer she once let escape casts an evil curse on her.
"The curse of armor disablement"
This curse may prove fatal for a knight, as it prevents her from equipping her armor.
However, Alicia does not lose her fighting spirit just because of this.
She manages to equip whatever she can find and heads to the sorcerer's castle by herself.
To slay him for sure this time and lift the curse put on her.
.....But the fact that the best gear that she could find was a maid's uniform is rather unfortunate.

FEATURE

  • 1-on-1 turn based combat mode
  • Select the appropriate command to fight according to the situation
  • Full vocal
